criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The core features and capabilities of the app, including AI-driven content generation, editing, or personalization.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: How easy and enjoyable the app is to use, including the interface, navigation, and overall design.

criteria.name: AI Implementation
criteria.description: The sophistication and effectiveness of the AI algorithms used in the app.

criteria.name: Content Quality
criteria.description: The quality and originality of the content generated or enhanced by the AI.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The ability of the app to tailor content and experiences to individual user preferences.
